personal.name: Syune Shakaryan
personal.title: Python Developer
personal.summary: Python Developer with 1.5+ years of experience building backend systems, data pipelines, and machine learning models. Skilled in REST APIs, data processing workflows, and automation in fast-paced startup environments. Familiar with AI-assisted development tools and modern AI concepts including LLMs, prompt engineering, and AI agents. Passionate about leveraging AI-driven development to build scalable backend systems and intelligent software solutions.

bullets.text: Joined at an early-stage startup and scaled core automation and data infrastructure to support company growth.
Developed and deployed trading automation software integrated with the Binance API.
Engineered a high-performance data processing pipeline using Pandas and NumPy to handle large financial datasets.
Took ownership of backend systems and operations automation, delivering results in a fast-paced environment.
Architected a custom backtesting engine using Python (Pandas, NumPy) to simulate trading strategies on historical datasets.
Implemented OOP principles to build modular, reusable strategy components, improving maintainability and test coverage.
Visualised performance metrics using Matplotlib, directly supporting optimisation of algorithmic trading logic.

projects.name: BBC News Archive Scraper
projects.description: Scalable web scraper collecting latest and historical BBC News articles, with Selenium-based dynamic content loading, User-Agent rotation to prevent IP blocking, and SQL/CSV storage.
bullets: Implemented Selenium-based dynamic content loading to handle JavaScript-rendered archive pages.
Designed User-Agent rotation and rate-limiting logic to maintain consistent scraping at scale.
Optimised navigation logic to store large volumes of historical data into SQL/CSV formats.

projects.name: Lead Generation Web Crawler
projects.description: Multi-threaded data parser extracting structured contact information from target websites, with DNS/Regex-based filtering, robots.txt compliance, and SQL deduplication.
bullets: Built multi-threaded crawler to extract structured contact data from hundreds of target websites.
Integrated DNS and Regex-based filtering to improve data quality and reduce noise.
Implemented robots.txt compliance, rate-limiting, and SQL-based deduplication logic.

projects.name: Cardiotoxicity ML Model (BIOPTIC)
projects.description: Binary classification model predicting drug molecule cardiotoxicity from SMILES strings. Engineered molecular graph features using RDKit; built and trained a GNN using PyTorch Geometric.
bullets: Engineered molecular features from SMILES strings for effective chemical representation.
Built binary classification model using PyTorch Geometric, scikit-learn, and RDKit.
Competed in the BIOPTIC ML competition, applying graph neural network techniques.

education.degree: B.Sc. in Informatics and Applied Mathematics
education.notes: Relevant coursework: Calculus, Abstract Algebra, Linear Algebra, Discrete Mathematics, Computer Networks, Data Structures, Machine Learning.

education.degree: Data Science and Machine Learning Course
education.notes: Comprehensive coursework: data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, ML algorithms, model evaluation.
